DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS7-L3-13001400-MSELA7-HJD-IMR-01 | MS ELA: Grade 7 | Analyze Use of Text Features in Public Documents | Historical Journal or Character Diary | Immigrant & Refugee Journeys
Written in Bold
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The boy is discussing his opinion about text features in public documents. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the boy gives to support his opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the boy describe the notice with the heading that said Children?
2QUESTION 2:
Where did the boy get the old papers he studied?
3QUESTION 3:
What does the boy say the numbered list did?
4QUESTION 4:
What does the boy conclude about text features for new arrivals?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
